features.description: post_actions handler dispatches actual commands instead of stub no-op

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: post_actions does not contain backup::create dispatch (should appear at least twice: once in create_backup, once in post_actions)

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_post_actions -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -5 | grep -c 'test result: ok' || echo 0

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: API endpoint requires running server with ClickHouse+S3 infrastructure. Compilation + unit tests provide sufficient coverage.

features.description: List endpoint supports offset/limit pagination with X-Total-Count header and format param

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'pub offset: Option<usize>' src/server/routes.rs | head -1 | grep -c 'ListParams' || grep -c 'offset.*Option.*usize' src/server/routes.rs

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_list_params -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -5 | grep -c 'test result: ok' || echo 0

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pagination is a query param parsing + in-memory skip/take operation. Unit test for deserialization plus structural check for header are sufficient.

features.description: BackupSummary has object_disk_size and required fields computed from manifest data

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub object_disk_size: u64' src/list.rs && grep -c 'pub required: String' src/list.rs | paste - - | awk '{print ($1 >= 1 && $2 >= 1 ? "PASS" : "FAIL")}'
layers.fail_message: BackupSummary missing object_disk_size or required fields

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after BackupSummary field additions

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_backup_summary_object_disk_size test_extract_required -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -5 | grep -c 'test result: ok' || echo 0

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Field computation is pure in-memory manifest iteration. Unit tests with constructed manifests verify correctness.

features.description: ListResponse.object_disk_size and .required populated from BackupSummary instead of hardcoded defaults

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_summary_to_list_response_sizes -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -5 | grep -c 'test result: ok' || echo 0

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure data mapping function (struct field copy). Unit test with known values is definitive.

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules

layers.name: structural
layers.command: test -f src/server/CLAUDE.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: grep -q 'Parent Context' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Directory Structure' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Key Patterns' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Parent Rules' src/server/CLAUDE.md && echo VALID || echo INVALID
